action.reasoning: This is the first iteration. I need to set up the basic project structure with model, training, and prediction scripts. I'll start with a simple U-Net architecture using a pretrained backbone (ResNet50) to get a baseline working quickly. I'll implement minimal functionality first - basic training loop, simple data loading, and prediction script that can handle original resolution images. The key is to get something running fast to establish a baseline and measure iteration time.
